plan.title: Optimizing LLM Context Engineering with XML Tags
plan.styleGuide: Dark palette with neon accents, continuous rightward pan, cinematic vertical 9:16.
plan.music: Ambient electronic, low BPM, building energy.

segments.title: Segment 1
segments.visual: A cinematic macro shot of a sleek developer workspace with warm accent lighting. The screen displays a high-contrast dark mode IDE with a complex, tangled JSON structure glowing in dim amber brackets. Overlaid on the code is a semi-transparent 3D attention-map infographic, displaying bright white lines representing model attention scattered and wasted on syntax quotes and braces. A continuous rightward camera pan begins.
segments.voiceover: Is your LLM's attention being wasted on JSON syntax? Let's fix your context engineering right now.

segments.title: Segment 2
segments.visual: Continuing the fluid rightward camera pan across the high-contrast screens. On the left, an animated 3D bar chart rises, demonstrating high attentional overhead for JSON vs low overhead for XML. On the right, the camera pans to reveal clean XML tags in glowing emerald green wrapping text blocks, with bright, focused bounding boxes of light enclosing the content to visualize localized self-attention.
segments.voiceover: JSON syntax overloads the self attention mechanism, while XML tags create clean, localized attentional bounding boxes.

segments.title: Segment 3
segments.visual: Continuing the rightward camera pan onto a split-screen analytics dashboard. On the left, a line graph rises and falls, showing a sharp decline in output variance and hallucination rate. On the right, a dynamic, pulsing network diagram representing the KV cache shows high-chaos amber nodes collapsing into highly structured, clean emerald nodes representing low-entropy context engineering.
segments.voiceover: Refactoring to XML reduces output variance and hallucinations. Save token costs and lower KV cache entropy.

segments.title: Segment 4
segments.visual: The continuous rightward camera pan resolves onto a polished physics-based desk setup with warm, glowing ambient lighting. Floating in front of a sleek desk monitor is a side-by-side prompt transformation infographic: a chaotic unstructured text block on the left is swept over by an emerald light beam, converting it instantly into a structured block with self-closing XML tags, accompanied by a glowing badge reading '+25% Attention Focus'.
segments.voiceover: Refactor one unstructured prompt to self closing XML tags today, and instantly unlock superior model performance.

sources.title: Prompt- and Context-Engineer with XML, not JSON | Kyle's Blog
Effective Prompt Engineering: Mastering XML Tags for Clarity, Precision, and Security in LLMs | Medium
Trapping LLM Hallucinations Using Tagged Context Prompts | arXiv

searchQueries: XML tags LLM attention hallucination context engineering
